test: T20 cold-boot verification (dev build, HEAD 8e768e0, fresh isolated context)

boot_1_onboarding_shown.note: brand-new isolated context (first-run onboarding modal shown; office rendered + connected behind it)

boot_2_onboarding_done.note: onboarding flag set (matches Ken's real machine); no modal; clean visual = coldboot-connected.png

t21_note: Dev convergence to CONNECTED was ~1.6-2.7s with the /office route + aihub proxy pre-compiled. The ~40s QA figure on prod is therefore first-load/bundler/prod-cold-start overhead, NOT the connect logic (the aihub probe + first feed poll land in <3s). T21 should measure prod convergence with the route already warm to isolate any real connect-path latency.
